description: BRCA1 p.Cys61Gly — a well-characterized pathogenic missense variant in the RING domain. ClinVar records include VCV000017661 and RCV000019229.
trimming_note: Original Ensembl response had ~40 transcript_consequences and ~5 colocated_variants. This fixture keeps 6 representative transcripts (one canonical-coding, one alt-coding, one NMD, one retained_intron, one intron_variant, one upstream_gene_variant) and 3 colocated variants (one dbSNP-with-ClinVar-and-gnomAD, one HGMD, one somatic COSMIC). Field shapes are preserved verbatim.
